mapper.select: SELECT B.BOARD_ID , B.TITLE , B.CONTENT -- , B.WRITER -- Oracle, MySQL 전부다 사용가능 , COALESCE(U.NAME, B.WRITER) AS WRITER , B.CREATED_AT , B.UPDATED_AT , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPLY R WHERE R.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID ) AS REPLY_COUNT FROM BOARD B LEFT JOIN USER_ACCOUNT U ON B.WRITER = U.LOGIN_ID ORDER BY B.BOARD_ID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT b.BOARD_ID , b.TITLE , b.CONTENT , b.WRITER , u.LOGIN_ID , u.NAME , b.CREATED_AT , b.UPDATED_AT FROM BOARD b LEFT JOIN USER_ACCOUNT u ON b.WRITER = u.LOGIN_ID WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD ( BOARD_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, WRITER, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( board_seq.NEXTVAL, #{title}, #{content}, #{writer}, SYSDATE )
